name: Crockpot Chicken & Artichoke Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds boiler-fryer chicken (cut into serving pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pat the chicken dry with paper towels.
2. Season the chicken with salt, white pepper, and paprika.
3. Brown the chicken in a large frying pan using 1 tablespoon butter.
4. Place mushrooms and drained artichoke hearts at the bottom of the crockpot.
5. Sprinkle quick-cooking tapioca over the vegetables.
6. Add the browned chicken pieces to the crockpot.
7. Pour in the chicken broth, sherry, and tarragon.
8. Cover the crockpot and turn it to Low heat setting.
9. Cook for 7-8 hours or on High heat for 5 hours.
10. If you prefer, you can omit the browning step of the chicken.
